articles.title: Why is the US going back round the Moon with Artemis II? A space policy expert explains
articles.excerpt: Final preparations are underway for NASA’s Artemis II mission, the first crewed mission around the Moon for more than 50 years. Four astronauts, three men and one woman, will spend 10 days aboard the Orion spacecraft, going further into space than any other h…
